overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world action game featuring a character in tribal armor standing on a mountain peak overlooking a vast coastal landscape with autumn forests and distant snow-capped mountains. The character transitions from observing the scenic vista to walking along a narrow rocky ridge as the camera smoothly follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain summit overlook with coastal vista

agents.ego_description: standing still on the rocky peak, facing away from the camera while looking out at the coastal landscape and distant mountains

entered.detail: jagged stone outcrop with patches of grass and autumn leaves where the character stands
distant town or settlement visible in the valley below near the water's edge
distant mountain peaks with white snow visible along the horizon
trees with orange, red, and yellow foliage covering the mountain slopes
tall thin metallic structures rising above the treeline in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky mountain summit bathed in warm golden hour light, overlooking a vast coastal landscape. Distant snow-capped mountains frame the horizon above an autumn forest, with ancient metal ruins visible far in the background and a settlement nestled in the valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain ridge path with steep drops

events.description: character transitions from standing still to walking forward along the rocky ridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow rocky ridge, moving deeper into the mountain terrain away from the overlook

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a narrow rocky ridge path, with the camera following smoothly from behind. The coastal vista gradually disappears from view as the character moves deeper into the mountain terrain, passing closer to the ancient metal ruins while the autumn forest and snow-capped peaks remain visible in the periphery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, panoramic vista on a mountain summit to a focused journey along a narrow rocky ridge. It begins with the character standing atop a peak bathed in warm golden hour light, overlooking a vast coastal landscape where autumn forests and a valley settlement stretch toward distant snow-capped mountains and ancient metal ruins. As the character begins to walk forward, the camera follows smoothly from behind, causing the expansive coastal view to gradually recede. The scene then shifts deeper into the rugged mountain terrain, bringing the ancient metal ruins into closer proximity while the autumn forests and peaks linger in the periphery.
